name: Heavyweight Cotton Base Tee

description: Lightweight merino blend t-shirt offering temperature regulation and odor resistance for extended wear.

name: Midweight Fleece Pullover
description: Breathable fleece mid-layer designed for warmth during low-output activities and cool weather use.

description: Synthetic insulated hoodie providing consistent warmth with improved moisture resistance.

description: Ultralight wind-resistant shell designed for high-output activities and variable alpine conditions.

description: Fully waterproof, seam-sealed shell engineered for protection in sustained wet and windy conditions.

description: High-loft down insulated shell designed for maximum warmth in cold, static environments.

description: Abrasion-resistant soft shell offering stretch, breathability, and weather resistance for active use.

name: Straight Leg Technical Pant
description: Durable technical pant with a clean silhouette, designed for movement and long-term wear.

name: Lightweight Trail Pant

name: All-Season Beanie
